channel.title: Computational Methods in Applied Mathematics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Computational Methods in Applied Mathematics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Convergence of an Operator Splitting Scheme for Fractional Conservation Laws with Lévy Noise
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2023-0174

item.title: The Partition of Unity Finite Element Method for the Schrödinger Equation
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2023-0115

item.title: Analysis and Numerical Simulation of Time-Fractional Derivative Contact Problem with Friction in Thermo-Viscoelasticity
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2023-0192

item.title: A Numerical Study of a Stabilized Hyperbolic Equation Inspired by Models for Bio-Polymerization
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2023-0222

item.title: Discontinuous Galerkin Methods for the Vlasov–Stokes System
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2023-0243

item.title: HDG Method for Nonlinear Parabolic Integro-Differential Equations
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2023-0060

item.title: Robust Multigrid Methods for Discontinuous Galerkin Discretizations of an Elliptic Optimal Control Problem
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2023-0132

item.title: Machine Learning Estimators: Implementation and Comparison in Python
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2023-0198

item.title: Quasi-Optimality of an AFEM for General Second Order Elliptic PDE
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2023-0238

item.title: Quadratic Discontinuous Galerkin Finite Element Methods for the Unilateral Contact Problem
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2023-0015

item.title: A Novel Fully Decoupled Scheme for the MHD System with Variable Density
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2024-0004

item.title: A Streamline Upwind Petrov-Galerkin Reduced Order Method for Advection-Dominated Partial Differential Equations Under Optimal Control
item.description: Article by Fabio Zoccolan, Maria Strazzullo, Gianluigi Rozza DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cmam-2023-0171
